ageGate.title: WELCOME
ageGate.textP1: To access this website you must be of legal drinking age in your country of residence.
ageGate.footerText: Drink responsibly. The sale of alcohol to minors is prohibited.

hero.subtitle: Since 1916 • Teramo, Abruzzo
hero.descriptionLine1: The liquid essence of a harsh and generous land.
hero.descriptionLine2: Tradition, patience, and nature captured in every drop of our liqueurs.

filosofia.subtitle: Our essence
filosofia.title: THE EXCELLENCE OF NATURE
filosofia.quote: "We produce liqueurs the old-fashioned way: with the time necessary for the earth to release its deepest secret."

abruzzo.name: Abruzzo
abruzzo.desc: Between Gran Sasso and the Adriatic, we capture the soul of a harsh and generous land.

vino.name: Wine
vino.desc: Trebbiano d’Abruzzo is the beating heart that welcomes and turns every root into poetry.

legno.name: Wood
legno.desc: Oak barriques guard the secret of time, giving softness and nobility.

lentezza.name: Slowness
lentezza.desc: Over 40 days of cold infusion. We don't force nature, we wait for it to reveal itself.

artigianato.name: Craftsmanship
artigianato.desc: Each bottle is a unique piece, hand-sealed in harmony with peasant culture.

typewriter.text:
> INITIALIZING...
> Maceration: ACTIVE
> Flavors: ZERO DETECTED
> Resting: IN BARRIQUE
> Filtration: ARTISANAL
> STATUS: READY

cards.artisanDesc: Typical Abruzzo recipes produced in small batches. Gentian, Ratafià, Licorice, Poppy, and Amaro.
cards.zeroDesc: Slow maceration of botanicals, resting in oak, and natural filtration. No added flavors.
cards.customDesc: Real customization for weddings. Bottles, labels, and packaging tailored for your event.

step1.title: Natural Selection
step1.desc: Meticulous search for the best herbs and roots in the Gran Sasso National Park. Gentiana Lutea, juniper berries, and wild botanicals are selected and hand-harvested in full respect of seasonal cycles, ensuring the absolute purity of the raw material.

step2.title: Cold Extraction
step2.desc: The heart of our artisanal process: no thermal or chemical forcing. We exclusively apply the technique of cold maceration, a slow and prolonged infusion lasting over 40 days to gently extract the aromatic soul and essential natural properties.

step3.title: Balance & Rest
step3.desc: After strictly artisanal filtration, the liqueur rests and refines in ancient oak barriques to smooth out any roughness. This aging confers softness, stabilizes the flavor over time, and gives that roundness and elegance typical of the Abruzzo tradition.

prodotti.subtitle: The Catalog
prodotti.title: OUR LIQUEURS
prodotti.desc: From Trebbiano d'Abruzzo combined with Gentiana Lutea root, to the softness of Ratafià. Every bottle contains the history of our territory.

items.name: Gentian
items.title: Typical Abruzzo liqueur from Trebbiano and gentian root
items.desc: Gentian is one of the most authentic symbols of the Abruzzo tradition. This liqueur is born from the infusion of Gentiana Lutea root in Trebbiano d'Abruzzo wine, left to mature slowly in oak barriques to develop depth and complexity.
items.ingredienti: Trebbiano d'Abruzzo, alcohol, gentian root, sugar (contains sulfites)
items.degustazione: Elegant bitter profile, with a vinous-aromatic base and a persistent finish. Serve cold (6–10°C), ideal as a digestive or paired with aged cheeses.

items.name: Licorice
items.title: Pure intensity from selected licorice
items.desc: A decisive and enveloping liqueur, obtained from concentrated licorice extracts. Perfect for those looking for a strong and recognizable taste.
items.degustazione: Dense, balsamic, with a balance between sweetness and bitterness. Excellent cold or with ice, also perfect as a strong end-of-meal drink.

items.name: Ratafià
items.title: Abruzzo tradition between wine and fruit
items.desc: Historic liqueur of peasant culture, made with red wine and fruit, according to an artisanal process that values the simplicity of the raw materials.
items.ingredienti: Red wine, fruit (sour cherries/black cherries), sugar, alcohol
items.degustazione: Soft and round, with notes of cherry and almond. Perfect with dry desserts or as a meditation liqueur.

items.name: Poppy
items.title: A taste outside the box
items.desc: An original proposal that combines floral delicacy and artisanal character. Designed for those looking for something different from classic liqueurs.
items.degustazione: Light, aromatic, with floral notes and a soft finish. Serve cold, also ideal as a refined gift idea.

items.name: Herbal Amaro
items.title: Natural digestive from selected herbs
items.desc: A classic amaro reinterpreted in an artisanal key, with a balanced mix of botanicals.
items.degustazione: Herbaceous, slightly spicy, with a clean bitter finish. Serve cold or with ice.

items.name: Arancello
items.title: Natural citrus freshness
items.desc: Liqueur obtained from the infusion of orange peels, expressing all the vivacity of citrus fruits.
items.degustazione: Fresh, fragrant, and slightly bitter. Serve very cold, ideal after meals or as a light aperitif.

items.name: Limoncello
items.title: Timeless classic of the Italian tradition
items.desc: Liqueur obtained from selected lemon peels, processed to keep the aromatic component intact.
items.degustazione: Intense and citrusy, with balanced sweetness. Serve ice-cold, perfect as an end-of-meal drink.

bomboniere.desc: Forget the usual impersonal favors. Create a true sensory journey for your guests, with packaging and formats completely tailored to your event.
features: Exclusive shape designs (square, oval, flat ball)
Labels, tags, and accessories coordinated with the event theme

footer.desc: Traditional Abruzzo liqueurs crafted by hand in Garrano Alto, in the Gran Sasso and Monti della Laga National Park.
footer.warning: Drink responsibly. <br class="md:hidden" /> The sale of alcohol to minors is prohibited.

sections.title: 1. Data Controller
paragraphs:
The Data Controller is:
DE NARDIS MARIANNA
Frazione Garrano Alto, 16 – 64100 Teramo (TE) – Italy
VAT: 01722800677 | Email: info@fattoriadenardis.it

sections.title: 2. Types of Data Collected
paragraphs: Our website collects the following types of personal data:
list: Browsing data: IP addresses or domain names of the computers used by users, URI notation addresses, time of request, method used to submit the request to the server, size of the file obtained in response, etc.
Data provided voluntarily: Name, email, phone number and other information provided by filling out contact forms or sending requests to our email.

sections.title: 3. Purpose of Processing
paragraphs: User Data is collected to allow the Controller to provide its Services, as well as for the following purposes:
list: Handling requests forwarded through the site (information on products, quotes for event favors, etc.)
Fulfillment of legal obligations or requests from Authorities.
Execution of anonymous statistics on site usage.

sections.title: 4. Legal Basis of Processing
paragraphs: The Controller processes Personal Data relating to the User if one of the following conditions exists:
list: The User has given consent for one or more specific purposes;
Processing is necessary for the performance of a contract with the User and/or for the performance of pre-contractual measures;
Processing is necessary to comply with a legal obligation to which the Controller is subject.

sections.title: 5. Processing Methods and Retention
paragraphs: Processing is carried out using IT and/or telematic tools, with organizational methods and with logic strictly related to the purposes indicated.

Data is processed at the operating offices of the Controller and stored for the time strictly necessary to achieve the purposes for which it was collected, or to fulfill specific regulatory obligations.

sections.title: 6. User Rights
paragraphs: Users may exercise certain rights regarding Data processed by the Controller. In particular, pursuant to the GDPR (EU Regulation 2016/679), the User has the right to:
list: Withdraw consent at any time;
Object to the processing of their Data;
Access their Data;
Verify and seek rectification;
Obtain the restriction of processing;
Obtain the erasure or removal of their Personal Data;
Receive their Data or have it transferred to another controller (portability);
Lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority.

paragraphs: Requests to exercise rights can be directed to the Controller at the email address info@fattoriadenardis.it.

sections.title: 1. What are Cookies?
paragraphs: Cookies are small portions of code installed within the browser that assist the Controller in providing the Service according to the described purposes. Some of the purposes of cookie installation may also require the User's consent.

sections.title: 2. Technical and Aggregated Statistics Cookies
paragraphs: This website uses cookies to save the User's session and to perform other activities strictly necessary to operate the site, for example to remember language preferences.
list: Browsing or session cookies: They guarantee the normal navigation and use of the website.
Functionality cookies: They allow the user to navigate according to a set of selected criteria (e.g., language) in order to improve the service provided.

sections.title: 3. Third-party Services (Statistics, Videos, etc.)
paragraphs: Some third-party analytical or content display services may collect aggregated statistics and may not require User consent, or may be managed directly by third parties.

For example, the use of Google Maps, YouTube videos, or basic (anonymized) Analytics metrics. For detailed information on cookies released by these services, the User is advised to consult the privacy policies of the listed third-party services.

sections.title: 4. How to manage or disable Cookies?
paragraphs: In addition to what is stated in this document, the User can manage cookie preferences directly within their browser and prevent – for example – third parties from installing them. It is important to note that by disabling all Cookies, the functioning of this site may be compromised.
You can find information on how to manage Cookies in the most popular browsers at the following addresses:
list: Google Chrome
Mozilla Firefox
Apple Safari
Microsoft Edge

sections.title: 5. Legal References
paragraphs: This information is prepared on the basis of multiple legislative systems, including articles 13 and 14 of Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR).
